panels.description: Fresh model tokens used by the team in the selected period (input + output only, excluding cache tokens).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens), 0) AS "Team Model Tokens"
FROM _tool_cursor_usage_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)

panels.title: Team Model Tokens

panels.description: Cache tokens in the selected period (cache read + cache write). These reflect reuse/accounting, not fresh model generation.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(SUM(cache_write_tokens + cache_read_tokens), 0) AS "Team Cache Tokens"
FROM _tool_cursor_usage_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)

panels.title: Team Cache Tokens

panels.description: All accounted tokens in the selected period: input + output + cache read + cache write.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens + cache_write_tokens + cache_read_tokens), 0) AS "All Accounted Tokens"
FROM _tool_cursor_usage_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)

panels.title: All Accounted Tokens

panels.description: Average fresh model tokens consumed per Cursor request in the selected period (input + output only).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ROUND(
    COALESCE(SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens), 0)
    / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0),
    2
  ) AS "Avg Model Tokens / Request"
FROM _tool_cursor_usage_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)

panels.title: Average Model Tokens per Request

panels.description: Percentage of all accounted tokens represented by cache read + cache write.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ROUND(
    COALESCE(SUM(cache_write_tokens + cache_read_tokens), 0) * 100.0
    / NULLIF(COALESCE(SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens + cache_write_tokens + cache_read_tokens), 0), 0),
    2
  ) AS "Cache Token Share %"
FROM _tool_cursor_usage_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)

panels.title: Cache Token Share

panels.description: Daily token volume trend for input, output, cache write, cache read, and overall total.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  DATE(timestamp) AS time,
  SUM(input_tokens) AS "Input Tokens",
  SUM(output_tokens) AS "Output Tokens",
  SUM(cache_write_tokens) AS "Cache Write Tokens",
  SUM(cache_read_tokens) AS "Cache Read Tokens",
  SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens + cache_write_tokens + cache_read_tokens) AS "Total Tokens"
FROM _tool_cursor_usage_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY DATE(timestamp)
ORDER BY DATE(timestamp)

panels.title: Daily Token Consumption Trend

panels.description: Per-user token totals in the selected period. Includes input, output, cache read, cache write, and overall total.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  user_email AS "User",
  SUM(input_tokens) AS "Input Tokens",
  SUM(output_tokens) AS "Output Tokens",
  SUM(cache_write_tokens) AS "Cache Write Tokens",
  SUM(cache_read_tokens) AS "Cache Read Tokens",
  SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens + cache_write_tokens + cache_read_tokens) AS "Total Tokens"
FROM _tool_cursor_usage_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY user_email
ORDER BY SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens + cache_write_tokens + cache_read_tokens) DESC
LIMIT 50

panels.title: Per-User Token Usage

panels.description: Token consumption by model to identify where most usage is concentrated.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(NULLIF(model, ''), 'Unknown') AS "Model",
  COUNT(*) AS "Requests",
  SUM(input_tokens) AS "Input Tokens",
  SUM(output_tokens) AS "Output Tokens",
  SUM(cache_write_tokens) AS "Cache Write Tokens",
  SUM(cache_read_tokens) AS "Cache Read Tokens",
  SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens + cache_write_tokens + cache_read_tokens) AS "Total Tokens",
  ROUND(SUM(charged_cents) / 100.0, 4) AS "Charged (USD)"
FROM _tool_cursor_usage_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(model, ''), 'Unknown')
ORDER BY SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens + cache_write_tokens + cache_read_tokens) DESC
LIMIT 25

panels.title: Top Models by Token Usage

panels.description: Effective cost per 1K model tokens by model using input + output as the denominator. Filtered to models with at least 100k model tokens and 20 requests so the ranking stays meaningful.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(NULLIF(model, ''), 'Unknown') AS "Model",
  COUNT(*) AS "Requests",
  SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens) AS "Model Tokens",
  SUM(cache_write_tokens + cache_read_tokens) AS "Cache Tokens",
  ROUND(SUM(charged_cents) / 100.0, 4) AS "Charged (USD)",
  ROUND(SUM(total_cents) / 100.0, 4) AS "Gross (USD)",
  ROUND((SUM(charged_cents) / 100.0) * 1000.0 / NULLIF(SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens), 0), 6) AS "Charged USD / 1K Model Tokens",
  ROUND((SUM(total_cents) / 100.0) * 1000.0 / NULLIF(SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens), 0), 6) AS "Gross USD / 1K Model Tokens"
FROM _tool_cursor_usage_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(model, ''), 'Unknown')
HAVING SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens) >= 100000
  AND COUNT(*) >= 20
ORDER BY (SUM(charged_cents) / 100.0) * 1000.0 / NULLIF(SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens), 0) DESC
LIMIT 25

panels.title: Effective Cost per 1K Model Tokens by Model

panels.description: Daily lowest charged USD per 1K model tokens across all models in the selected period.

targets.rawSql:
WITH per_model_day AS (
  SELECT
    DATE(timestamp) AS day,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(model, ''), 'Unknown') AS model_name,
    (SUM(charged_cents) / 100.0) * 1000.0 / NULLIF(SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens), 0) AS cost_per_1k
  FROM _tool_cursor_usage_events
  WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  GROUP BY DATE(timestamp), COALESCE(NULLIF(model, ''), 'Unknown')
  HAVING SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens) > 0
)
SELECT
  day AS time,
  ROUND(MIN(cost_per_1k), 6) AS "Lowest Charged USD / 1K Model Tokens"
FROM per_model_day
GROUP BY day
ORDER BY day

panels.title: Daily Lowest Charged USD per 1K Model Tokens

panels.description: Model-token share by model in the selected period, based on input + output only. This is more useful than all-accounted tokens because cache tokens can dominate and distort the breakdown.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(NOW()) AS time_sec,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(model, ''), 'Unknown') AS metric,
  SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens) AS value
FROM _tool_cursor_usage_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(model, ''), 'Unknown')
HAVING SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens) > 0
ORDER BY SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens) DESC
LIMIT 10

panels.title: Model Share by Model Tokens

panels.description: Model-token share by user in the selected period, based on input + output only. This highlights actual model consumption instead of cache-heavy accounting.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(NOW()) AS time_sec,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(user_email, ''), 'Unknown') AS metric,
  SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens) AS value
FROM _tool_cursor_usage_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(user_email, ''), 'Unknown')
HAVING SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens) > 0
ORDER BY SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens) DESC
LIMIT 10

panels.title: User Share by Model Tokens

panels.description: Ranked view of charged USD per 1K model tokens by model. Filtered to models with at least 100k model tokens and 20 requests so tiny samples do not distort the ranking.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(NULLIF(model, ''), 'Unknown') AS "Model",
  ROUND((SUM(charged_cents) / 100.0) * 1000.0 / NULLIF(SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens), 0), 6) AS "Charged USD / 1K Tokens"
FROM _tool_cursor_usage_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(model, ''), 'Unknown')
HAVING SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens) >= 100000
  AND COUNT(*) >= 20
ORDER BY (SUM(charged_cents) / 100.0) * 1000.0 / NULLIF(SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens), 0) DESC
LIMIT 15

panels.title: Effective Charged USD per 1K Model Tokens by Model

panels.description: Daily highest charged USD per 1K model tokens across all models in the selected period.

targets.rawSql:
WITH per_model_day AS (
  SELECT
    DATE(timestamp) AS day,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(model, ''), 'Unknown') AS model_name,
    (SUM(charged_cents) / 100.0) * 1000.0 / NULLIF(SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens), 0) AS cost_per_1k
  FROM _tool_cursor_usage_events
  WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  GROUP BY DATE(timestamp), COALESCE(NULLIF(model, ''), 'Unknown')
  HAVING SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens) > 0
)
SELECT
  day AS time,
  ROUND(MAX(cost_per_1k), 6) AS "Highest Charged USD / 1K Model Tokens"
FROM per_model_day
GROUP BY day
ORDER BY day

panels.title: Daily Highest Charged USD per 1K Model Tokens

panels.description: Total charged USD by model in the selected period.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(NULLIF(model, ''), 'Unknown') AS "Model",
  ROUND(SUM(charged_cents) / 100.0, 4) AS "Charged USD"
FROM _tool_cursor_usage_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(model, ''), 'Unknown')
HAVING SUM(charged_cents) > 0
ORDER BY SUM(charged_cents) DESC
LIMIT 25

panels.title: Total Charged USD by Model

panels.description: Share of total charged USD by model in the selected period. This directly shows which model contributes the largest portion of team spend.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(NOW()) AS time_sec,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(model, ''), 'Unknown') AS metric,
  ROUND(SUM(charged_cents) / 100.0, 4) AS value
FROM _tool_cursor_usage_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(model, ''), 'Unknown')
HAVING SUM(charged_cents) > 0
ORDER BY SUM(charged_cents) DESC
LIMIT 10

panels.title: Model Share of Team Charged USD

panels.description: Total charged USD per developer across all models in the selected period.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(NULLIF(user_email, ''), 'Unknown') AS "User",
  ROUND(SUM(charged_cents) / 100.0, 4) AS "Charged USD"
FROM _tool_cursor_usage_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(user_email, ''), 'Unknown')
HAVING SUM(charged_cents) > 0
ORDER BY SUM(charged_cents) DESC
LIMIT 25

panels.title: Total Charged USD by Developer

panels.description: Share of total charged USD by developer across all models in the selected period.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(NOW()) AS time_sec,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(user_email, ''), 'Unknown') AS metric,
  ROUND(SUM(charged_cents) / 100.0, 4) AS value
FROM _tool_cursor_usage_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(user_email, ''), 'Unknown')
HAVING SUM(charged_cents) > 0
ORDER BY SUM(charged_cents) DESC
LIMIT 10

panels.title: Developer Share of Team Charged USD

panels.description: Weekly grouped correlation by developer showing model tokens, USD spent, and lines committed side by side for each developer in each week.

custom.axisLabel: Weekly Totals (Tokens in K, USD x100, LOC)

targets.rawSql:
WITH usage_weekly AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_SUB(DATE(timestamp), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(timestamp) DAY) AS week_start,
    LOWER(COALESCE(NULLIF(user_email, ''), 'unknown')) AS user_key,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(user_email, ''), 'Unknown') AS user_label,
    SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens) AS model_tokens,
    ROUND(SUM(charged_cents) / 100.0, 4) AS usd_spent
  FROM _tool_cursor_usage_events
  WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  GROUP BY DATE_SUB(DATE(timestamp), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(timestamp) DAY), LOWER(COALESCE(NULLIF(user_email, ''), 'unknown')), COALESCE(NULLIF(user_email, ''), 'Unknown')
),
loc_weekly AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_SUB(DATE(authored_date), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(authored_date) DAY) AS week_start,
    LOWER(COALESCE(NULLIF(author_email, ''), 'unknown')) AS user_key,
    SUM(COALESCE(additions, 0) + COALESCE(deletions, 0)) AS lines_committed
  FROM commits
  WHERE $__timeFilter(authored_date)
  GROUP BY DATE_SUB(DATE(authored_date), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(authored_date) DAY), LOWER(COALESCE(NULLIF(author_email, ''), 'unknown'))
)
SELECT
  CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(u.week_start, '%Y-%m-%d'), ' | ', u.user_label) AS "Week / Developer",
  ROUND(u.model_tokens / 1000.0, 2) AS "Model Tokens (K)",
  ROUND(u.usd_spent * 100, 2) AS "USD Spent x100",
  COALESCE(l.lines_committed, 0) AS "Lines Committed"
FROM usage_weekly u
LEFT JOIN loc_weekly l
  ON l.week_start = u.week_start
 AND l.user_key = u.user_key
ORDER BY u.week_start, u.user_label

panels.title: Weekly Developer Output vs Rescaled Token Usage vs USD Spend
